highlights: New Window Rules page: one place to manage everything that used to live across Snapping Assignments, Tiling Assignments, Animations App Rules, and the per-mode disabled-apps lists. Browse, add, edit, duplicate, drag-reorder, and disable rules from a single list

Each rule matches windows by class, title, role, app ID, desktop, activity, and screen, and now also by transient/notification kind, window size, and focus. Match terms combine with AND, OR, and NOT, then the rule applies snapping, tiling, animation, appearance (borders, title bars, corner radius, accent color, gaps, opacity), or exclusion actions

Your existing assignments, animation app rules, and per-monitor / per-desktop / per-activity disable settings were migrated automatically on first launch. If something looks off, your old configuration is preserved on disk and can be restored manually
Snapping focus options to match autotiling: optionally focus a window when it snaps into a zone on open, and focus-follows-mouse over snapped windows (both off by default)
Per-window appearance for snapping: borders, corner radius, hidden title bars, and accent colors, mirroring the tiling options (the old Snapping → Appearance page is now called Zones)
Zone span toggle mode: tap the span modifier to start and stop spanning instead of holding it down for the whole drag
Unsnapped windows now return to the monitor and spot they closed on after you log back in (on by default, and can be turned off globally or per app)
Smoother animations: window move, resize, and snap now play a shader-driven morph, and the on-screen popups fade and scale in and out
Live, interactive shader preview in the Shaders browser, with save/load presets and inline error messages so you can see a shader before applying it
Settings get easier to navigate: a collapsible sidebar, a per-monitor scope chip with a spatial map of your displays, and consistent Snapping/Tiling layouts
Faster and lighter: substantially lower memory and idle CPU use, and settings pages that used to lag on first open now load quickly
Scripted tiling algorithms are now written in Luau (a safe, sandboxed language) instead of JavaScript. All built-in algorithms are ported. Custom JavaScript scripts must be rewritten in Luau
Fixed: layouts no longer render stretched when editing on a 16:9 or 4K screen, and a zone-spanning window no longer jumps to fullscreen when you switch layouts
Now supports KDE Plasma 6.7 (KDE Frameworks 6.26, Qt 6.10, KWin 6.7). The KWin effect is ported to the 6.7 effect API. Plasma 6.6 is no longer supported (#638)
Reworked in-process snap-assist thumbnail capture for KWin 6.7, which removed the offscreen-QML readback the old path used. Thumbnails now render via an offscreen GLFramebuffer (#638)

Fixed the zone-selector popup switching the active layout on hover when snap-assist was up. Dragging a window past the top of the screen no longer resnaps every other tiled window into a different layout (#542)
Removed: switching the autotile algorithm by hovering the zone-selector popup. Use NextLayout / QuickLayout1–9 / Layout Picker (Meta+Alt+Space) instead (#542)

Fixed intermittent DPMS-wake autotile orphan reassignment on dual-monitor setups. KWin's screenAdded/screenRemoved signals now latch the screen-change-in-progress flag early enough to catch the per-window outputChanged race (#527, #536)

Fixed windows from disabled monitors being pulled into the active autotile zone after DPMS sleep. The autotile path now skips KWin's orphan-window reassignment, matching the existing snapping-side guard (#527, #528)

Fixed focus-follows-mouse stealing focus from active floating and overflow windows when the cursor wandered onto an underlying tiled window. Focus-follows-mouse now pauses until a tiled window becomes active (#461, #525)

Fixed focus-follows-mouse activating tiled windows underneath an active emoji picker, notification popup, or krunner. Focus-follows-mouse now pauses until a tileable window becomes active (#461, #521)
Fixed stale pending-restore entries for excluded apps growing session.json and logging on every daemon start (#461, #521)
Fixed drag artifacts, post-snap flicker, and a gray decoration ring during snap drags on hybrid Intel+NVIDIA setups (#516, #523)
Skip redundant layer-shell setter messages across virtual-desktop switches (#522)
Fixed focus-follows-mouse stopping after any OSD, snap preview, or layout picker was shown on an autotile monitor (#461, #517)
Fixed popups and dialogs consuming the main window's saved zone on reopen. Snap-restore now matches structural window kind (#461, #518)
Fixed the passive overlay shell staying mapped and prewarmed even with effects disabled (#515, #519)
Fixed animation shader pattern features (sparkle, streak, smoke) scaling inconsistently across different monitor sizes (#520)
Fixed per-virtual-desktop and per-activity assignment toggles being unable to re-enable once turned off. The row's disabled state was cascading to the nested switch (#461, #514)
Fixed a KWin crash (SIGSEGV) that could take down the whole compositor, closing every open application, when snapping a window to a zone on certain monitors (#511, #513)
Fixed a window snapped near a monitor boundary jumping onto the wrong screen after a fast cross-monitor drag (#513)
Fixed the "Cancel Zone Overlay" Escape shortcut grabbing Esc system-wide, including over fullscreen games, after an unexpected daemon exit (#461, #510)
Fixed per-monitor virtual-desktop and activity disable toggles getting stuck in the off position (#461, #510)
Fixed windows opened on monitors or desktops with snapping disabled still being auto-snapped until the daemon was restarted (#461, #510)
Fixed Electron child popups such as Steam image previews polluting focus tracking and routing real windows into the popup's zone (#461, #510)
Fixed session-restored windows being missing from zone-occupancy tracking, so snap assist and empty-zone placement treated filled zones as free (#461, #510)
Fixed snap assist appearing for every empty zone after a bulk resnap that placed nothing (#461, #510)
Window open and close animations (bounce, fly-in) no longer render as ghosted, multi-copy trails on KWin (#475)
New windows no longer flash at their spawn position before animating into their zone or tile (#475)
Snap-restored windows now play their open animation into the resolved zone instead of from the screen center (#475)
The soft glow behind the OSDs now animates with the card instead of popping in when the transition ends (#475)
Fixed a faint grey halo painted around OSDs during the bounce and fly-in transitions (#475)
bounce now drops the window in from above its frame, matching niri's original motion (#475)
The layout OSD, navigation OSD, layout picker, and zone selector now share one card style with a consistent soft glow (#475)
Removed the crosswarp transition. Its front-speed control is now a frontSpeed parameter on wave-warp (#475)
Removed the plasma-flow transition, which duplicated soft-warp-fade (#475)
Fixed the settings window (and any 5th+ window) being left tiled when toggling autotile to snapping with more autotiled windows than zones in the manual layout (#504)
Fixed the 250 ms+ stall before windows start moving on the autotile-to-snap toggle. Windows now animate to their snap positions within ~2 ms (#504)
Fixed focus-follows-mouse not re-focusing a window after focus was stolen by a keyboard shortcut, click, or new window (#461)
Fixed tiling assignments saved on the settings page silently dropping. The dropdown selection now persists across navigation (#497)
Fixed the daemon toggle re-enabling itself after disable. The unit is now masked so window-lifecycle D-Bus calls can't reactivate it (#497)
Fixed the Snapping Assignments Monitor row reverting to its old value after Save when a per-desktop or per-activity entry masked the screen-level slot (#497)
Fixed the OSD announcing the wrong layout name after editing a non-current-context assignment slot (#497)
Fixed windows on disabled monitors / desktops still being tracked and resurrected after restart (#461)
Fixed re-enabling a disabled virtual desktop sometimes silently failing after a screen redetect (#461)
Fixed popup menus and Steam image previews being snapped to weird zones (#461)
Fixed stale snap assignments from deleted layouts lingering across first-launch (and dangling zone IDs in multi-zone windows) (#461)
Fixed critical-notification windows triggering focus tracking and appearing in the app picker (#461)
Fixed the shader picker dropdown being disabled in the layout editor after enabling shader effects (#494)
Fixed newly-opened windows still auto-snapping to zones when snapping was turned off globally (#461)
Fixed keyboard snap-to-zone shortcuts still firing when snapping was turned off globally. Snapping.Enabled=false is now a total kill-switch at parity with autotiling (#461)
Fixed Electron/CEF child surfaces (Steam image previews, Discord popups, VS Code dialogs) being snapped to zones (#461)
KWin effect-load failures now name the exact build-vs-running KWin version and the remediation, instead of a generic 'effect not running' message (#481)
Nix flake hardened: new overlays.default output, and module/install docs explicitly steer users toward the NixOS/Home Manager modules and away from the unsafe `nix profile install` path (#481)
Fixed maximized windows ballooning in size when autotiled (#461)
Fixed snapping and keyboard snap-to-zone ignoring the per-monitor, per-desktop, and per-activity disable settings (#461)
Fixed windows with a blank window class restoring into each other's saved zones (#461)
Fixed windows staying tiled after switching onto a desktop where autotiling is disabled (#461)
Fixed the KWin desktop effect not appearing on NixOS. The flake now builds PlasmaZones against your system's KWin so the effect always matches the running compositor (#481)
Fixed support report generation crashing on Qt 6.11+. The plasmazones-report tool and the bug-report instructions now use busctl, which is unaffected (#481)
Fixed zones sliding underneath a top panel, with the bottom edge over-reserved. The daemon now uses the compositor's authoritative work area for panel struts (#461, #472)
Fixed layouts shifting toward the desktop origin after a monitor powered off and back on, such as on DPMS wake or hotplug (#465, #467)
Fixed windows being laid out over panels on the first layout pass at startup (#466)
Support reports and the daemon now show whether the KWin effect bridge is connected
openSUSE packages are now published to the openSUSE Build Service

Virtual screens for ultrawide monitors: subdivide a physical monitor into independent logical screens, each with its own layouts, autotile state, snap-assist, OSDs, shortcuts, and per-desktop or per-activity assignments. New swap and rotate actions with a confirmation OSD

Animation App Rules let you assign motion curves, shader overrides, and per-event timings to specific apps. A two-layer resolver with leaf seeds gives widgets distinctive tunings even when they share a parent rule

New animation engine with vertex-shader plumbing and live-texture sampling, plus 47 ported transition shaders: 28 from niri, 9 from Burn-My-Windows, 10 BMW-inspired originals, an audio-reactive neon-city cityscape, a Matrix rain port, a 3D chrome-protocol rewrite, and user-texture support

Unified PassiveOverlayShell: OSDs, snap-assist, layout picker, zone selector, and zone overlay all run in one click-through shell with independent slot animations and explicit z-order, replacing the legacy NotificationOverlay
Krohnkite-style autotile: drag a tiled window onto another to reorder slots live, and a new Unlimited overflow lets the stack grow past the algorithm's natural cap instead of evicting windows
Animations settings overhauled into drill-down sub-pages with motion sets for themed override bundles, a per-event shader picker, a generic shader browser, and a separate Snapping Shaders page
Layout ordering for cycling: cycle shortcuts follow a user-configurable order set per-mode under Settings → Snapping or Tiling → Ordering, instead of the implicit save-time order
Per-mode disable lists: snapping and autotiling each have their own exclusion lists for monitors, virtual desktops, and activities, with the disabled-context OSD pointing the user at the right toggle
Hold and toggle controls now work in always-active mode (#249): a binding like Right Mouse Button activates when always-active is off and deactivates when on, FancyZones-style
Global "auto-assign new windows for all layouts" master toggle (#370) and a separate "Desktop switch OSD" toggle (#372)
Drag protocol rewritten so the daemon owns all drag routing decisions (#310), eliminating the ~40s dead-drag stalls reported when settings reload mid-drag
Meta-F float toggle now runs daemon-local (#310): sub-50ms keypress to toggle instead of stalling on D-Bus backpressure across four hops
Native-feeling wheel scroll across every settings page (#405) using Kirigami.WheelHandler for Plasma-aware scroll speed

Phosphor SDK: core services are extracted into reusable LGPL libraries covering engine, layout-api, animation, shaders, workspaces, placement, tiles, zones, screens, snap-engine, tile-engine, config, fsloader, shell-patterns, wayland, and layer. A new phosphor-compositor SDK lets third-party Wayland compositors host the placement, tiling, and overlay services without depending on KWin
Fixed brand-new virtual desktops not picking up the user's default mode and layout (#368)
Fixed snap-assist showing windows from other virtual desktops as occupied (#323)
Fixed per-activity layout assignments losing to per-monitor defaults in the layout registry precedence order (#413)
Fixed the Layouts context menu eventually failing to open after enough show and hide cycles (#406)
Fixed autotile shortcut adjustments to master ratio and master count not persisting across reloads (#271)
Fixed a cycle-triggered resnap that affected windows on other virtual desktops

New BUILD_KWIN_EFFECT CMake option (default ON) lets packagers build PlasmaZones on distros with KWin < 6.6 (Debian 13, Ubuntu 24.04, Fedora 40) by skipping just the C++ effect plugin (#321, thanks @iubayb)
Fixed Qt 6.8 build failure from a Qt 6.9-only QWaylandWindow::updateExposure() call. It is now guarded with a QT_VERSION check and a public-API fallback (#321)
Fixed Emby and other Electron/CEF apps silently breaking after mid-session WM_CLASS rename (#271). Float toggle, focus navigation, and snap operations now survive class mutations
New WindowRegistry decouples runtime state from mutable app classes. The daemon always reads the live class instead of a frozen first-seen string
Fixed master window ballooning to 100% on every notification (#271). A 75ms debounce coalesces spurious KWin minimize/unminimize cycles triggered by plasmashell popups
Filtered Plasma shell surfaces (notification popups, emoji picker, krunner) out of autotile tracking entirely
Settings toggle now recovers the systemd unit from failed state, so users can re-enable PlasmaZones after killing a terminal-run daemon without logging out
Fixed startup race where ephemeral windows (Steam splash, Electron notifications) bypassed the autotile size filter
New --log-file flag for easy file-based log capture
Autotile eligibility diagnostics show window properties at debug level
New --debug flag for easy diagnostic log capture (plasmazonesd --debug)
Deeper autotile debug logging for diagnosing the intermittent ratio bug (#271)
Fixed autotile windows being pushed off-screen when their minimum size exceeds the assigned zone
Reverted min-size clearing regression from 2.8.1 that triggered the off-screen centering
Added diagnostic logging for autotile retiles, min-sizes, zone geometries, and window eligibility
Fixed autotile ratio getting stuck after notification auto-dismiss (e.g., media player notifications)
Stale window min-sizes are now cleared on screen geometry changes to prevent split ratio override
Support report generator for quick bug report archives
Autotiled windows now survive layout switches, mode toggles, and daemon restarts
Visual OSD feedback when toggling on a disabled desktop or screen
Config migrated to v2 nested schema with automatic migration from v1
Assignments and session state split to dedicated files for cleaner configs
Daemon toggle now enables systemd service for autostart on login
Fixed assignment persistence and tiling order across daemon restarts
Fixed window restore after config v2 migration
Scripted algorithms with @param metadata now get auto-generated UI controls (sliders, switches, combo boxes)
Configurable ratio step size for master ratio keyboard adjustments
Per-screen master ratio and count overrides now persist correctly
Fixed shader dark band at adjacent zone edges in Aretha Shell
Reset to defaults now clears per-algorithm autotile settings
Editor shader error box restored, shader category duplication fixed
Config migrated from INI to JSON format with automatic migration on first launch
Dragging a window off autotile now keeps it where you dropped it
Master ratio and count shortcuts show actual values in the OSD
Shortcut-adjusted ratio and count now persist across reboots
Small utility windows like the emoji picker no longer enter the autotile tree
Focus-follows-mouse no longer steals focus through under-size windows
Tumbleweed Drift shader gains sand streams, stronger audio reactivity, and faster animation
Snap assist, overlay, and shortcut stability improvements
Tumbleweed Drift shader with openSUSE desert landscape and audio-reactive dust effects
Neon Venom and Chrome Protocol shaders
Voxel terrain now uses depth buffer and multipass rendering
Shader engine gains depth buffer support, per-channel filter/wrapping, and presets
Autotile JS API adds per-window context, custom parameters, and lifecycle hooks
Layout ordering settings for snapping and tiling cycle
Focus-follows-mouse no longer steals focus through excluded or overlay windows
Shortcut-adjusted master ratio and count now save to disk
Layout picker no longer overwrites the global default when selecting per-screen
What's New dialog shown on first launch after update
Vulkan and rendering pipeline stability fixes
Fixed autotile split ratio expanding to full width with some apps
Overlay tools like Spectacle and color pickers are no longer auto-tiled
Fixed trigger settings reverting after daemon restart
Algorithm previews in zone selector now respect metadata
Fixed window picker exclusion lists not saving
Fixed autotile split ratio corruption on state load
Separate autotile sticky window handling setting
Fixed editor shader and undo crashes
Fixed Arch Linux packaging
All 24 tiling algorithms are now JavaScript with hot-reload and custom user scripts
Dwindle (Memory) algorithm with persistent split positions across window close/reopen
Works on Hyprland, Sway, Wayfire, niri, COSMIC, and other Wayland compositors
Vulkan rendering backend with automatic OpenGL fallback
New Layout and Algorithm creation wizards
Layout filter bar with group-by, sort-by, and search
Disable PlasmaZones per virtual desktop or activity
Per-algorithm settings storage for split ratio and master count
Settings redesign with collapsible cards and consolidated footer
Single-instance settings app with unsaved changes confirmation
Center-distance zone selection for overlapping zones
Fixed window picker inserting unmatchable values
Fixed keyboard shortcuts moving excluded windows
Fixed drag-out unsnap not clearing persisted zone
New Plasma Sigil shader with animated energy effects
Fixed System Settings crash when opening PlasmaZones KCM
SVG support for shader textures with configurable resolution
Fixed exclusions UI not being able to add new entries
Fixed Neon Phantom shader white-out
Fixed identical monitors showing as duplicates in settings
Fixed App-to-Zone rules not matching some app IDs
Fixed exclusions ignored by auto-snap and keyboard shortcuts
New Ember Trace and Neon Phantom shaders
Fixed multi-zone span pulling in background zones
Settings UI now refreshes when daemon starts from toggle
ConfigDefaults is now the single source of truth for all settings
Settings bounds exposed to QML via SettingsController
Fixed edge threshold resetting to 100px
Fixed per-screen autotile split ratio using wrong default
KZones layout import
Aspect ratio layouts with auto-detection and filtering
Portable Wayland build for non-KDE compositors
Standalone settings app with sidebar navigation, search, and shortcuts overlay
New Arch Drift and EndeavourOS Drift branded shaders
Fixed synchronous D-Bus calls freezing compositor
Fixed layout card button flicker on hover
Improved zone selector edge scrolling speed and trigger zone
Fixed shader preview crash on hover
Fixed CAVA settings not applied dynamically
Fixed flickering icons on layout card hover
Fixed resnap buffer empty on layout change
Per-screen mode toggle and layout cycle scoped to target screen
Unified layout change resnap path
Fixed EDID serial mismatch between KWin effect and daemon
Fixed Move/Swap hotkeys on dual same-model monitors
Fixed Move/Swap hotkeys using wrong screen's layout
Fixed modifier key settings zeroed on save
Batch settings D-Bus method for applying multiple settings at once
Per-screen settings D-Bus methods
Zone previews in autotile dropdowns
Daemon is now the sole config writer, eliminating race conditions
Fixed windows unsnapping when monitor enters standby
Fixed navigation shortcuts snapping to wrong screen on multi-monitor
Fixed KCM assignment save rewriting modes
Resnap/retile on KCM assignment changes
Per-screen resnap buffer for multi-monitor setups
Fixed autotile not activating when snapping disabled first
Batched D-Bus signals for autotile transitions, reducing messages from ~45 to 3
Fixed window state lost on daemon reload
Fixed screen not found on Wayland due to hex serial mismatch
Fixed autotile window order lost on rapid mode toggle
Stable EDID-based screen identifiers that survive replug and reboot
Per-screen layout filtering in cycle, picker, and zone selector
Per-screen layout locking with Meta+Ctrl+L shortcut
Shader parameter locking in editor
Hot reload for shaders
Fixed snap assist sending windows to wrong monitor
Fixed primary screen detection on Wayland
Complete German translations
Independent border and title bar toggles
Border corner radius setting
Right-click context menu for layouts
Monitor selector for layout editor
Fixed double toggle-float on multi-monitor setups
Per-desktop/activity tiling state isolation
Assignment storage migrated from JSON to KConfig
New Fedora, NixOS, openSUSE, and KDE Neon zone shaders
Fixed editor zones not reaching canvas edges during drag
Fixed missing retileAllScreens D-Bus slot
Fixed negative zone geometries from constraint solver
Fixed Arch lib64 file conflict with generic tarball

Easing preset dropdown UX improvements
Autotiling engine with 10 algorithms including Master+Stack, BSP, Dwindle, and Spiral
Per-screen algorithm selection with independent settings
Hide title bars on tiled windows with configurable focus border
Translate-only slide animations with staggered cascading
Cubic bezier easing curve editor with live preview
Dual-view layout picker with Snapping/Tiling modes
Comprehensive unit tests for all algorithms
Fixed shortcuts not working until window is manually snapped
Fixed Nix build failure after systemd service template change
Fixed login freeze with many shortcuts via async D-Bus registration
Fixed global shortcuts broken after v1.15.9/v1.15.10
Fixed release workflow retry loop
Fixed login freeze with async D-Bus shortcut key grabs
Fixed login freeze with autostart apps via deferred shortcut registration

KWin 6.6.2 compatibility rebuild

Fixed multi-zone snap cascade in tiling layouts

Edge tolerance now respects settings instead of hardcoded 5px
KWin effect plugin version lock for reliable loading
Fixed overlapping zone snapping so the smallest zone at cursor wins
Fixed RPM packaging for translation files
Mosaic Pulse audio-reactive shader
User-supplied image textures for shaders, up to 4 images
Shared GLSL utilities extracted for all shaders

Per-side edge gaps for independent top/bottom/left/right spacing

Full screen geometry toggle to ignore panels and taskbars

Signal-driven drag detection replaces poll timer entirely
Event-driven cursor tracking during drag
Throttled drag signals to ~30Hz
Eliminated QDBusInterface for WindowDrag calls
Dynamic poll timer: 500ms idle, 32ms during drag
Reduced D-Bus traffic during drag from 60Hz to 30Hz
Deferred D-Bus calls during drag until trigger detected
Fixed KCM tab button resizing

Master toggle for zone span
Master toggle for snap assist
Fixed Nix flake evaluation error
Snap Assist trigger override: hold modifier to enable per-snap
Fixed drag stutter from redundant D-Bus calls at 60-144+ calls/sec
Fixed login hang from synchronous D-Bus in exclusion settings
EDID-based monitor identification so layouts survive port changes
Nix flake with NixOS module and Home Manager module

Toggle activation mode: single press instead of hold
Proximity snap always active without modifier
Fixed Snap Assist D-Bus calls freezing compositor
Fixed session restore placing windows on wrong display
Escape during drag now dismisses overlay without cancelling drag

Default layout now selected on fresh install
CI-generated RPM spec and Debian changelog from CHANGELOG.md
Multiple binds per action, up to 4 independent triggers
Click-to-edit existing triggers in settings
AND semantics for combined modifier+button triggers
Conflict detection for duplicate triggers
Zones can overlap autohide/dodge panels
Fixed compositor freeze from processEvents() during drag
Fixed snap assist not dismissing properly

Proximity snap always-on option
Escape key cancels overlay during window drag
Snap Assist: Aero Snap style window picker to fill empty zones

Shader preset load/save in editor

Overlay follows cursor when dragging to another monitor
Full zone label font customization with family, size, weight, and style
Font picker dialog with live preview and search

Paint-to-span zone modifier: progressively paint across zones while dragging

Resnap-to-new-layout shortcut
Shortcut consolidation
KWin PlasmaZones effect enabled by default on install
